title: DOM Manipulation & Events
description: Learn how to interact with HTML elements using JavaScript DOM manipulation and handle user events.

subtopics.title: Selecting Elements
Modifying Content
subtopics.content:
Change element content and styles:

**Content Properties:**
- `.textContent` - Text content
- `.innerHTML` - HTML content (use carefully)
- `.value` - Form input values

**Style Properties:**
- `.style.color = 'red'`
- `.style.backgroundColor = '#f0f0f0'`
- `.style.fontSize = '18px'`

**Example:**
```javascript
const message = document.getElementById('message');
message.textContent = 'Hello World!';
message.style.color = 'blue';
message.style.fontSize = '24px';
```

**Security Note:**
- Avoid innerHTML with user input
- Sanitize content when possible

subtopics.title: Event Handling
Dynamic Updates
subtopics.content:
Create interactive and responsive pages: **Creating Elements:** ```javascript const newDiv = document.createElement('div'); newDiv.textContent = 'Dynamic content'; newDiv.className = 'highlight'; document.body.appendChild(newDiv); ``` **Removing Elements:** ```javascript const element = document.getElementById('removeMe'); element.remove(); // Modern and simple ``` **Template Literals:** ```javascript const userCard = `

${name}

${email}

`; document.getElementById('container').innerHTML = userCard; ``` **Performance Tips:** - Use document fragments for multiple updates - Batch DOM operations when possible

glossary.definition: Document Object Model - the structure of HTML documents as objects.
A function that waits for specific events to occur on an element.
An HTML element represented as a JavaScript object.
